https://res.wx.qq.com/mmbizappmsg/zh_CN/htmledition/js/assets/handle_change_inter_identity.mpf6as7914eec1a5.css @charset "utf-8"; button[data-v-f0da0cfe] { color: var(--weui-GLYPH-WHITE-0); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .text1[data-v-f0da0cfe] { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .text2[data-v-f0da0cfe] { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--weui-GLYPH-WHITE-1); } .reward_area_carry_whisper .headimg_wall { padding-top: 8px !important; } .reward_skin_primary .headimg_wall { padding-top: 20px !important; } .reward_skin_primary .headimg_wall__avatar { margin: 0px 6px 6px 0px !important; } .headimg_wall[data-v-002a2598] { margin: 12px auto 0px; position: relative; left: 3px; padding-top: 8px; max-width: 100%; text-align: center; } .headimg_wall__summary[data-v-002a2598] { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; line-height: 20px; font-size: 14px; cursor: default; position: relative; color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .headimg_wall__summary_arrow[data-v-002a2598] { font-size: 10px; margin-left: 4px; width: 1em !important; height: 2em !important; } .headimg_wall__inner[data-v-002a2598] { margin: auto; line-height: 1; } .headimg_wall__list[data-v-002a2598] { padding-top: 12px; overflow: hidden; transition: height 0.3s linear; margin-bottom: -10.5px; display: inline-block; text-align: left; position: relative; left: 4px; } .headimg_wall__avatar[data-v-002a2598] { --border-radius: 100%; position: relative; display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; width: var(--headimg-wall-avatar-width); height: var(--headimg-wall-avatar-width); margin: 0 var(--headimg-wall-avatar-gap) var(--headimg-wall-avatar-gap) 0; } .headimg_wall__avatar .headimg_wall__img_wrp[data-v-002a2598] { border-radius: var(--border-radius); overflow: hidden; display: inline-block; font-size: 0px; } .headimg_wall__avatar img[data-v-002a2598] { width: 100%; border-radius: var(--border-radius); height: 100% !important; } .headimg_wall__avatar.private[data-v-002a2598], .headimg_wall__avatar.headimg_wall__avatar_placeholder[data-v-002a2598] { --border-radius: 2px; } .headimg_wall__avatar.headimg_wall__fill_bg[data-v-002a2598] { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .headimg_wall__avatar.readmore[data-v-002a2598] { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .headimg_wall__avatar.headimg_wall__avatar_mask[data-v-002a2598] { position: relative; } .headimg_wall__avatar.headimg_wall__avatar_mask[data-v-002a2598]::before { content: " "; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); border-radius: var(--border-radius); } .headimg_wall__avatar.headimg_wall__avatar_mask[data-v-002a2598]::after { content: " "; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: rgba(210, 210, 210, 0.38); border-radius: var(--border-radius); } .headimg_wall__avatar.headimg_wall__avatar_mask img[data-v-002a2598] { filter: blur(7px); } .headimg_wall__avatar.headimg_wall__avatar_placeholder[data-v-002a2598] { background-color: var(--weui-BG-1); border-radius: var(--border-radius); } .pay__tag-reward[data-v-002a2598] { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 14px; height: 14px; background-size: cover; background-image: } .reward_inner { position: relative; } .reward-avatar { display: inline-block; width: 48px; height: 48px; margin: 0px auto; border-radius: 4.8px; overflow: hidden; } .reward-avatar img { width: 100%; object-fit: cover; height: 100% !important; } .reward-author { font-size: 14px; text-align: center; margin-top: 8px; } .reward_button { margin-top: 20px; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgb(250, 81, 81); display: table; min-width: 184px; width: auto; } .reward_button:not(.weui-btn_disabled):visited { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .reward_button:not(.weui-btn_disabled).wx_tap_highlight_active { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgb(225, 73, 73); } .reward_button .icon_reward { margin: -0.2em 4px 0px 0px; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; width: 24px; height: 24px; mask: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' margin-top: 12px; line-height: 24px; min-height: 1em; text-align: center; } .reward_tips::before, .reward_tips::after { font-family: "PingFang SC", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif; } .reward_tips::before { content: "ŌĆ£"; margin-right: 0.34em; } .reward_tips::after { content: "ŌĆØ"; margin-left: 0.34em; } .reward_qrcode_area { margin: 38px 0px 20px; padding: 30px 20px; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid rgb(235, 235, 235); } .reward_qrcode_area p { overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .reward_qrcode_area .tips_global { font-size: 13px; } .reward_qrcode_area .reward_money { font-size: 30px; margin-top: 0.6em; margin-bottom: -0.1em; line-height: 1; font-family: WeChatNumber-151125; } .reward_qrcode_area .reward_tips { margin-top: 1em; margin-bottom: 0px; } .reward_qrcode_img_wrp { width: 200px; height: 200px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: block; margin: 1.5em auto 1.6em; } .reward_qrcode_img { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; } @font-face { font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-family: WeChatNumber-151125; src: url("https://res.wx.qq.com/mmbizwap/zh_CN/htmledition/assets/WeChatNumber-170206.ttf") format("truetype"); } @media (min-device-width: 414px) { .reward_qrcode_area .tips_global { line-height: 1.8; } .reward_qrcode_area .reward_money { margin-top: 0.6em; } .reward_qrcode_img_wrp { width: 224px; height: 224px; margin: 1.8em auto; } .reward_access { line-height: 44px; font-size: 17px; } .icon-reward { width: 19px; height: 20px; vertical-align: -3px; } } .reward_area_primary .reward-avatar { border-radius: 4px; } .reward_area_primary .reward-author { margin-top: 8px; font-size: 14px; } @supports (-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch) { .reward_button { font-weight: 700; } } .reward_skin_primary .reward_area { padding: 35px 10% 20px; } .reward_skin_primary .reward_tips { margin: 0px 0px 15px; font-size: 16px; } .reward_skin_primary .reward_tips::before, .reward_skin_primary .reward_tips::after { display: none; } .reward_skin_primary .reward_user_tips.weui-loadmore { border-top-color: transparent; } .reward_area_carry_whisper .reward_whisper_wrp { margin-bottom: 16px; } .reward_whisper_primary { margin-top: 12px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .reward_whisper_primary a { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .reward_whisper_primary_link::after { color: var(--weui-FG-2); content: ""; display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; margin-left: 6px; vertical-align: top; position: relative; top: 0.05em; width: 1em; height: 2em; mask-position: 50% 50%; mask-repeat: no-repeat; mask-size: 100%; background-color: currentcolor; mask-image: background-size: 1em; vertical-align: middle; background-repeat: no-repeat; } .emotions { overflow: hidden; position: relative; z-index: 1; padding: 0px; } .emotions_item { float: left; width: 24px; height: 24px; line-height: 24px; font-size: 0px; text-align: center; background-color: var(--weuiDesktop_cardBgColor); } .emotions_item:hover { background-color: var(--weuiDesktop_globalBgColor); } .emotions_item img { cursor: pointer; margin-top: 0px; width: 20px; height: 20px; vertical-align: middle; display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; background-size: 20px; user-select: none; } .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --appmsgExtra-BG: #121212; } } .wx-root, body { --new-title-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .9); } .wx-root[data-weui-theme="dark"], body[data-weui-theme="dark"] { --new-title-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .8); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body.appmsg_content_new_ui { --new-content-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, .55); } } .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_link { opacity: 0.5; } .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_card { background-color: rgb(235, 235, 235); } .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_cell { background-color: var(--weui-FG-5); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx_tap_highlight_active.wx_tap_card { background-color: rgb(43, 43, 43); } } .wx_css_active:active { opacity: 0.5; } ------MultipartBoundary--4JXiuQEjwjl3KFzyIsZwk7GMDwHkwRbfnjtFmAAgWh---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: cid:css-0edc01a0-233e-4714-9592-83b59754d8e5@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; .weui-dialog_link { transform: translateY(-75%); } ------MultipartBoundary--4JXiuQEjwjl3KFzyIsZwk7GMDwHkwRbfnjtFmAAgWh---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: cid:css-4bff6693-6335-4009-9185-33ebc6ce27f4@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; @keyframes rotate { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(1turn); } } @keyframes pointer-blink { 0% { opacity: 0; } 50% { opacity: 1; } 100% { opacity: 0; } } .reward_dialog { user-select: none; } .reward_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; } .reward_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog { padding: 0 env(safe-area-inset-right) 0 env(safe-area-inset-left); } .reward_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd { padding: 0px 24px; } .reward_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side .weui-icon-close-thin { mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' xmlns:xlink='http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink' width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24'%3E %3Cdefs%3E %3Crect id='dda90263-a290-4594-926f-6aba8cb4779f-a' width='24' height='24' x='0' y='0' rx='12'/%3E %3C/defs%3E %3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E %3Cmask id='dda90263-a290-4594-926f-6aba8cb4779f-b' fill='%23fff'%3E %3Cuse xlink:href='%23dda90263-a290-4594-926f-6aba8cb4779f-a'/%3E %3C/mask%3E %3Cuse fill='%23000' fill-opacity='.05' xlink:href='%23dda90263-a290-4594-926f-6aba8cb4779f-a'/%3E %3Cg fill-opacity='.9' mask='url(%23dda90263-a290-4594-926f-6aba8cb4779f-b)'%3E %3Cpath fill='%23000' d='M11.407 15.464L6.693 10.75l1.179-1.179 4.125 4.125 4.124-4.125L17.3 10.75l-4.714 4.714a.833.833 0 0 1-1.179 0z'/%3E %3C/g%3E %3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E"); } .reward_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side .weui-btn_icon { left: 0px; } .reward_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom) !important; } .reward_dialog-error { line-height: 105px; text-align: center; color: rgb(136, 136, 136); font-size: 14px; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area { padding: 8px 32px; text-align: left; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area .reward_custom-input_title { font-size: 12px; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area .reward_custom-input { display: flex; margin: 12px 0px; padding: 12px 0px; line-height: 1em; font-size: 40px; font-weight: 500; border-bottom: .5px solid var(--weui-FG-3); position: relative; font-family: WeChatSansSS-Medium; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area .reward_custom-input.reward_custom-input_invalid { border-bottom: .5px solid var(--weui-RED); } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area .reward_custom-input .reward_custom-input_value { position: relative; flex: 1 1 0%; display: flex; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area .reward_custom-input .reward_custom-input_value .reward_custom-input_char { position: relative; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area .reward_custom-input .reward_custom-input_value .reward_custom-input_hotarea { width: 100%; height: 100%; top: 0px; left: -50%; position: absolute; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area .reward_custom-input .reward_custom-input_value .reward_custom-input_hotarea.last { flex: 1 1 0%; position: relative; left: -0.25em; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area .reward_custom-input .reward_custom-input_pointer { width: 2px; height: 1.2em; display: block; background-color: var(--weui-BRAND); position: absolute; margin: 0.2em 0px 0px 0.575em; top: 0px; left: 0px; pointer-events: none; animation: 1.2s ease 0s infinite normal none running pointer-blink; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area .reward_custom-tips { font-size: 12px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .reward_custom .reward_custom-input_area .reward_custom-tips.tips_error { color: var(--weui-RED); } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard { position: absolute; width: 100%; bottom: 0px; padding-top: 8px; padding-right: 8px; padding-left: 8px; padding-bottom: calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom) + 8px); background-color: var(--weui-BG-1); display: flex; box-sizing: border-box; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_number { display: flex; width: calc(75% - 2px); flex-flow: wrap; margin-right: 8px; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_number .reward_custom-keyboard_item { width: calc(33.3333% - 5.33333px); margin: 0px 8px 8px 0px; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_number .reward_custom-keyboard_item:nth-of-type(3n), .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_number .reward_custom-keyboard_item:last-child { margin-right: 0px; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_number .reward_custom-keyboard_item.double, .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_number .reward_custom-keyboard_item:last-child { margin-bottom: 0px; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_number .reward_custom-keyboard_item.double { width: calc(66.6667% - 2.66667px); } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control { display: flex; width: calc(25% - 6px); flex-flow: column wrap; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control .reward_custom-keyboard_del_btn { position: relative; margin-bottom: 8px; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control .reward_custom-keyboard_del_btn::after { content: ""; background-color: var(--weui-FG-0); width: 21px; height: 16px; mask-size: contain; mask-repeat: no-repeat; mask-position: center center; .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control .reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn { height: 160px; line-height: 160px; color: var(--weui-WHITE); background-color: var(--weui-BRAND); font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; font-family: inherit; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control .reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn:active { background-color: rgb(6, 174, 86); } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control .reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn::after { content: attr(data-content); } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control .reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn.reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn_disabled { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.3); } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control .reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn.reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn_loading::before { content: ""; display: block; .reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn.reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn_loading:active { background-color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control .reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn.reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn_loading::after { content: ""; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_item { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 48px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); font-size: 22px; font-family: WeChatSansSS-Medium; border-radius: 4px; text-align: center; } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_item:active { background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control .reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn:active { background-color: rgb(32, 199, 112); } .reward_custom .reward_custom-keyboard .reward_custom-keyboard_control .reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn.reward_custom-keyboard_submit_btn_disabled { background-color: rgba(7, 193, 96, 0.3); } } ------MultipartBoundary--4JXiuQEjwjl3KFzyIsZwk7GMDwHkwRbfnjtFmAAgWh---- } .dialog-pay { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28); position: fixed; inset: 0px; z-index: 5000; } .dialog-pay_body { width: 20em; height: 16em; box-sizing: border-box; max-width: 80%; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02) 0px 2px 10px, rgb(242, 242, 242) 0px 1px inset; padding: 20px 16px 23px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); margin-top: -50px; } .dialog-pay_title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-align: center; } .dialog-pay_close.dialog-pay_close { position: absolute; left: 20px; top: 20px; } .dialog-pay_close.dialog-pay_close .weui-icon-close-thin { width: 2.2em; height: 2.2em; color: var(--weui-FG-1); vertical-align: top; } .dialog-pay_close.dialog-pay_close .weui-icon-back-arrow-thin { width: 1.1em; height: 2.2em; color: var(--weui-FG-1); vertical-align: top; } .dialog-pay_close-inner { width: 14px; height: 14px; background: url("data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABgAAAAYCAYAAAGXcA1uAAAABGdBTUEAALGPC/xhBQAAAhdJREFUSA2dVT1OAkEUZjfECns7L2BB7NXeQ1gAhYEEjQVwBKDQWNkoegsPgL0NB/AGFGhnFr9vMt/L7CwTwCl4M2++nzdvZ5fadDo9qvmRMY7H4zVjzp//DAmIG6/NQYBKwjEmk8mTIfwEua98vV4fAPGiTaIbjcaJqtdG6xCj1+t9C+h8gH5Vwh2RdCKRLCSbKSm6bbAqFHAN9Gw0GrUlFUcKMOeK4sQrtDAtEQVUsUYgiSMgurWAboGfTc+JLhxv/FmtVo+MGuYQWwsQOLpSM7Ydhz6OrUVQNCIInyCYkwBxBK6PC3haB7iJRYGYZ1nmWrcBfIv9B+Tn+XA4dAf3pIoT8g4MsTmw5w7AkkigMgXkFIO5b4oxCfXesAwpE8xhBC5Cktv0ZXCuUXpwLCXP8zttDgaDC80VSwTWXBTFPcsggOeiq8CMRogPmOqeY8dgKYZnUvfYzlKfBVaskHjp4tYJrBiQfunAu9T0mzNYd9gtgfeNqtjzlpl3e0aiFYjtbRQJ13hKfJcu7ZH81yglrI+TGaj6XY22CUuvYqCNlBFu8oKXUzi1QhUrr5g0ECBhZD1OCYtvb4ISceRbjVx4ARwExmf8gLKAmBOuk5upHne73R/s7XzrKgYp4bgVidZVrrcZ7CocHp/zbUZ8k/sA2Z/RtlsRG2idMqpD8AObS8QF37y4FRLYFsHn56UNrY5/RlfIvf8BFZS4vHr1OsEAAAAASUVORK5CYII=") 0% 0% / 14px 14px; } .dialog-pay__button { margin-top: 1em; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(87, 107, 149); } .dialog-pay__button-fixed { top: 10em; } .dialog-pay__local { padding: 40px 30px; } .dialog-pay__item { font-size: 20px; color: rgb(255, 95, 59); padding: 0.4em 0px; text-align: center; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgb(255, 95, 59); float: left; } .dialog-pay__item + .dialog-pay__item { margin-left: 15px; } .dialog-pay__local-wrap { display: flex; } .dialog-pay__item { -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 0%; } .dialog-pay__local-wrap + .dialog-pay__local-wrap { margin-top: 15px; } .dialog-pay__input-wrap { border-radius: 4px; padding: 22px 18px; background-color: rgb(247, 247, 247); font-size: 16px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); display: flex; margin-top: 60px; } .dialog-pay__input { margin-right: 10px; -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 1 0%; } .dialog-pay__input input { background: none; border: 0px; float: right; text-align: right; line-height: 22px; } .dialog-pay__input input::-webkit-input-placeholder { opacity: 0.2; font-size: 16px; line-height: 17px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .dialog-pay__input input::placeholder { opacity: 0.2; font-size: 16px; line-height: 17px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .dialog-pay__confirm { font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; color: rgb(255, 95, 59); } .dialog-pay__confirm-cut { padding: 0px 24px 0px 17px; position: relative; } .dialog-pay__confirm-cut::before { position: absolute; top: 2px; width: 1px; height: 20px; background-color: rgb(204, 204, 204); content: ""; } .dialog-pay__dollor { width: 7px; height: 9px; display: inline-block; background: url("data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAA4AAAASCAYAAAEcW9+nAAAABGdBTUEAALGPC/xhBQAAAhdJREFUOBGNUj1oFEEU/ma5aDTHESSKBBK4RlFQFCyU3T0vRUpF0ggiZC+GQ6y01EJipUWIhVhEVBLUdBYqKASLoCYoIkGwsBEhgqCC+EOCybr7/N7M7eYOgmThbr73fe97M+/NQKLKHmSfRP7HDLtVhsO9kMFgqpXWSKIwouGgYiP1oBcrMqABxHtNtdpp8Zlq0YPE76yyFP+0qwz6cwoMC5yF4CoMzmWKOKVW6UGaLJjJWWMV/vEgMT3HXaaIYR2brSt33O6cpyoVJOndRlYPjPlkMXC9AOmcB34ddURMXHB4Q/IFtttGarYoJ/Ujmz3E6UuJgmouDPXtJPfW3Hi0VMDGLV1Y/r5I0Z02WXkP07Zfky3Bo78ieszfG4hMmYnZUi4qyFpBqdRurj1ZtiL3W1DAERXp3ET0TUMz8aK3QHZMA4Y+E3ZxMjddzKaAthkbmHgrxW15nGXoyis8zS0eNnO8kuAeT3iC+z3gKY81i82YHY2zRJ3cB5S7d7s2a/4lpLhIch7l/gNmZCRtMUXBfRYf4J3MsIk+1dzACKQWnkSa3iHzGV0dO8zotA6Ux/SfsYeQpls0DSunX27UQIYOH0Lyd47sb3S0l7H45ylN+2g6T9MVzck+vpvQp+V2RnB0RSZ3r8bmB+OvqzHGWaQx7px1wE7RPsDWSTan6UPvZ8XpZvL/2LtsJp9fWDNnPTt6azrXQf4DED3QTN0PSV0AAAAASUVORK5CYII=") 0% 0% / 7px 9px; margin-right: 1px; vertical-align: 6px; } .reward-area { padding: 0px; text-align: center; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); position: relative; z-index: 2; height: 0px; overflow: hidden; transition-duration: 0.4s; transition-timing-function: ease-in; transition-delay: 0.4s; box-sizing: content-box; top: -195px; opacity: 0; } .reward-area-show { display: block; top: 0px; opacity: 1; height: 250px; } .reward-area__title { padding: 25px 32px 0px; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-align: left; } .reward-area__title-link { float: right; font-size: 14px; color: rgb(75, 144, 226); } .reward-list-wrap { position: relative; width: 50%; } .reward-list { padding-top: 1.75em; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); user-select: none; text-align: center; } .reward-list-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; -webkit-box-pack: justify; justify-content: space-between; } .reward-list__item { width: 31%; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-FG); background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03); border-radius: 4px; padding: 12px 0px; line-height: 1.4; display: block; font-family: WeChatSansSS-Medium; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: none; } .reward-list__item:active { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } .reward-link { display: inline-block; padding: 13px 0px 15px; color: rgb(75, 144, 226); } .reward-custorm { text-align: left; padding-top: 2.8em; position: absolute; top: 0px; right: 0px; width: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; } .reward-input-area { display: block; font-size: 44px; line-height: 1em; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); padding-bottom: 4px; border-bottom: .5px solid var(--weui-FG-3); } .reward-input-area__error { border-bottom: .5px solid var(--weui-RED); } .reward-input-box { font-family: WeChatSansSS-Medium; font-weight: 500; display: inline-block; } .reward-input-yen { float: left; } .reward-input { border: 0px; outline: 0px; appearance: none; background-color: transparent; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); font-size: 44px; line-height: 1em; height: 1em; width: 2em; font-family: WeChatSansSS-Medium; font-weight: 500; position: relative; top: -2px; padding-left: 30px; margin-left: -30px; } .reward-input::-webkit-input-placeholder { position: relative; top: 2px; } .reward-input::placeholder { position: relative; top: 2px; } .reward-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button, .reward-input::-webkit-inner-spin-button { appearance: none; margin: 0px; } .reward-input::-webkit-input-placeholder { color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); } .reward-input-hint { font-size: 12px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); margin: 12px 0px 0px; padding: 0px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 16.8px; font-family: "PingFang SC"; } .reward-input-hint__error { color: var(--weui-RED); } .reward-operation { position: absolute; width: 100%; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; color: var(--weui-FG); font-size: 17px; line-height: 50px; text-align: center; } .reward-operation:active, .reward-operation:hover { background: rgba(144, 144, 144, 0.1); } .reward-button-wrap { margin-top: 20px; } .reward-button-wrap .reward-operation-button { font-size: 14px !important; } .reward-slider-container { position: relative; height: 13em; overflow: hidden; } .reward-slider { position: absolute; width: 200%; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 100%; transition: 0.4s ease-in-out; } .reward-slider__custorm { left: -100%; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .dialog-pay { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28); } .dialog-pay_body { background-color: rgb(44, 44, 44); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02) 0px 2px 10px, rgb(44, 44, 44) 0px 1px inset; } .reward-area { background-color: rgb(44, 44, 44); } .dialog-pay_title { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .dialog-pay_close-inner { background-image: } .dialog-pay__item { color: rgb(250, 81, 81); border-color: rgb(250, 81, 81); } .dialog-pay__input-wrap { background-color: rgb(44, 44, 44); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .dialog-pay__confirm { color: rgb(250, 81, 81); } .reward-list { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .reward-list__item { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03); } .reward-list__item:active { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .dialog-pay__button, .reward-area__title-link, .reward-link { color: rgb(125, 144, 169); } .reward-area__title, .reward-input-area { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .reward-input { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .reward-input::-webkit-input-placeholder { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); } .reward-operation { color: rgb(250, 81, 81); } .reward-operation:active, .reward-operation:hover { background: rgba(144, 144, 144, 0.1); } .reward-operation::before { border-top-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } body .reward-operation-button.weui-btn[disabled] { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); } } @keyframes rotate { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(1turn); } } .author_profile-info { display: flex; padding: 13px 20px; align-items: flex-start; } .author_profile-info .author_profile-info_avatar { border-radius: 4px; margin: 3px 16px 0px 0px; width: 64px; height: 64px; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; background-repeat: no-repeat; } .author_profile-info .author_profile-info_main { text-align: left; flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; } .author_profile-info .author_profile-info_main .author_profile-info_main_nickname { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 24px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); margin-bottom: 4px; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; } .author_profile-info .author_profile-info_main .author_profile-info_main_content { display: flex; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--weui-FG-1); line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 2px; } .author_profile-info .author_profile-info_main .author_profile-info_main_content .author_profile-info_main_region { margin-right: 8px; } .author_profile-info .author_profile-info_main .author_profile-info_main_content:last-child { margin-bottom: 0px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; } .author_profile-pay_area { position: relative; padding: 16px; margin: 8px 20px 16px; border-radius: 6px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-1); font-size: 14px; } .author_profile-pay_area.fold { padding: 0px; } .author_profile-pay_area .author_profile-pay_btn { display: block; width: 100%; line-height: 40px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); font-weight: 500; border: 0px; background: transparent; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 6px; } .author_profile-pay_area .author_profile-pay_btn:active { background-color: var(--weui-FG-3); } .author_profile-pay_area .author_profile-pay_area_head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .author_profile-pay_area .author_profile-pay_area_head a { color: var(--weui-LINK); } .author_profile-pay_area .author_profile-pay_area_btns { margin-top: 12px; display: flex; flex-flow: wrap; } .author_profile-pay_area .author_profile-pay_area_btns .author_profile-pay_area_btn { width: calc(33.3333% - 8px); height: 62px; line-height: 62px; background: var(--weui-BG-2); border-radius: 8px; font-family: WeChatSansSS-Medium; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-FG); display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; margin: 0px 12px 12px 0px; } .author_profile-pay_area .author_profile-pay_area_btns .author_profile-pay_area_btn:nth-of-type(3n) { margin-right: 0px; } .author_profile-pay_area .author_profile-pay_area_btns .reward_pop_panel img { display: block; margin: 0px auto 10px; width: 110px; height: 110px; background-color: rgb(237, 237, 237); } .reward_pop_panel strong { display: block; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9); } .reward_pop_panel.reward_pop_show { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; } .reward_pop_panel.reward_pop_bottom { bottom: auto; margin-bottom: 0px; top: 100%; opacity 0.15s; } .subscribe-status-wording-leave-active[data-v-769fa6a3] { transition: opacity 0.3s; } .subscribe-status-wording-enter[data-v-769fa6a3], .subscribe-status-wording-leave-to[data-v-769fa6a3] { opacity: 0; } .subscribe-status-wording-enter-to[data-v-769fa6a3], .subscribe-status-wording-leave[data-v-769fa6a3] { opacity: 1; } .searchword-comment[data-v-769fa6a3] { height: 20px; } .rich_media_extra_title_old[data-v-769fa6a3] { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .rich_media_extra_title_pc[data-v-769fa6a3] { font-size: 15px; font-family: "PingFang SC"; font-weight: 500; color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .weui-flex__item_pc[data-v-769fa6a3] { margin-bottom: 20px; margin-top: 24px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; } .comment-flex_pc[data-v-769fa6a3] { padding: 0 var(--discussPageGap); } .comment_primary_input_multiline[data-v-769fa6a3] { position: relative; } .js_bottom_input_emoji[data-v-769fa6a3] { margin-top: 2px; } .pc_input_emoji[data-v-769fa6a3] { margin-right: 8px; } .fake_cmt_input[data-v-769fa6a3] { padding-bottom: 34px; } .ich_media_extra_discuss_not_img[data-v-769fa6a3] { background-color: cid:css-c7730b49-8e26-43a5-bee7-f0c025afac0c@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; body { --weui-custom-elpsLine: 2; --weui-custom-elpsFontSize: 1rem; --weui-custom-elpsLineHeight: 1.4; --weui-custom-elpsColor: rgba(0, 0, 0, .9); --weui-custom-elpsSymbolFS: 60px; --weui-custom-elpsSymbolLSApple: 2em; --weui-custom-elpsSymbolFSApple: inherit; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-custom-elpsColor: rgba(255, 255, 255, .8); } } .weui-custom-ellipsis__wrp { position: relative; color: var(--weui-custom-elpsColor); font-size: var(--weui-custom-elpsFontSize); line-height: var(--weui-custom-elpsLineHeight); overflow: hidden; text-align: justify; } .weui-custom-ellipsis__text { display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: var(--weui-custom-elpsLine); -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; color: transparent; line-height: 0; font-size: var(--weui-custom-elpsSymbolFS); } @supports (-apple-trailing-word:auto) { .weui-custom-ellipsis__text { font-size: var(--weui-custom-elpsSymbolFSApple); letter-spacing: var(--weui-custom-elpsSymbolLSApple); } } @supports (-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch) { .weui-custom-ellipsis__text { font-size: var(--weui-custom-elpsSymbolFSApple); letter-spacing: var(--weui-custom-elpsSymbolLSApple); } } .weui-custom-ellipsis__text__extra, .weui-custom-ellipsis__text__inner { display: inline; vertical-align: top; } .weui-custom-ellipsis__text__inner { font-size: var(--weui-custom-elpsFontSize); line-height: var(--weui-custom-elpsLineHeight); color: var(--weui-custom-elpsColor); letter-spacing: normal; } .weui-custom-ellipsis { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 100%; width: 200%; pointer-events: none; } .weui-custom-ellipsis__fake-text, .weui-custom-ellipsis__placeholder, .weui-custom-ellipsis__extra { float: left; } .weui-custom-ellipsis__fake-text { visibility: hidden; width: 50%; } .weui-custom-ellipsis__placeholder { width: 50%; } .weui-custom-ellipsis__placeholder::before { display: block; content: "11"; width: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; } .weui-custom-ellipsis__extra { transform: translate(-100%, -100%); } .weui-custom-ellipsis__extra { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; pointer-events: auto; } .weui-custom-ellipsis__symbol { margin-right: 4px; } .weui-custom-ellipsis__symbol:last-child { margin-right: 0px; } .weui-custom-ellipsis__fold-btn { background: transparent; border: 0px; padding: 0px; outline: 0px; font-size: var(--weui-custom-elpsFontSize); color: var(--weui-LINK); } .weui-custom-ellipsis_unfold .weui-custom-ellipsis__text { display: block; } .weui-custom-ellipsis_unfold .weui-custom-ellipsis { display: none; } .sns_praise_btn.praised { color: var(--weui-BRAND); } .comment_list_dialog { --discussPageGap: 24px; pointer-events: auto; } .comment_list_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog { padding: 0 env(safe-area-inset-right) 0 env(safe-area-inset-left); } .comment_list_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd { padding: 0px 24px; } .comment_list_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { padding-bottom: 0px; } .comment_list_dialog .comment_list_hd { padding: 16px var(--discussPageGap) 0; } .comment_list_context { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding-top: 24px; box-sizing: border-box; } .comment_list_context .comment_list_inner { flex: 1 1 0%; min-height: 0px; overflow: auto; overscroll-behavior: contain; } .comment_list_context .comment_list_bd { margin-bottom: 120px; } .comment_list_context .weui-loadmore.weui-loadmore_default { margin-top: 32px; } .comment_list_context .sns_opr_btn { color: var(--weui-FG-1); } .comment_list_context .praised .praise_num, .comment_list_context .praised .sns_opr_btn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .comment_list_text_wrp { --weui-custom-elpsFontSize: 17px; --weui-custom-elpsLineHeight: 1.6; --weui-custom-elpsLine: 3; --weui-custom-elpsSymbolFS: 20px; --weui-custom-elpsSymbolLSApple: .5em; user-select: none; } .comment_list_text_wrp .weui-custom-ellipsis__placeholder::before { content: "111"; } .comment_list_text_wrp .weui-custom-ellipsis__extra { background: var(--weui-BG-2); position: relative; z-index: 1000; } .comment_list_opr_wrp { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-top: 16px; } .comment_list_opr_btn { padding: 6px 12px 6px 8px; background: var(--weui-BG-3); border-radius: calc(1.14286em); overflow: hidden; font-size: 14px; } .comment_list_opr_btn.sns_opr_btn:not(.readonlyd) { color: var(--weui-FG-0); } .comment_list_opr_btn.sns_opr_btn::before { font-size: 20px; } .comment_list_opr_btn.sns_more_btn { padding: 0px; min-width: 32px; min-height: 32px; } .comment_list_opr_btn.sns_more_btn .sns_opr_gap { position: absolute; top: -999em; } .comment_list_opr_btn:active { position: relative; } .comment_list_opr_btn:active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); } ------MultipartBoundary--4JXiuQEjwjl3KFzyIsZwk7GMDwHkwRbfnjtFmAAgWh---- } .masonry-feed__item-cover > .lazyload_wrapper[data-v-ce1eba59] { position: absolute; object-fit: cover; object-position: var(--img-pos); width: 100%; height: 100%; top: 0px; left: 0px; background-size: 1em; vertical-align: middle; background-repeat: no-repeat; } .emotions { overflow: hidden; position: relative; z-index: 1; padding: 0px; } .emotions_item { float: left; width: 24px; height: 24px; line-height: 24px; font-size: 0px; text-align: center; background-color: var(--weuiDesktop_cardBgColor); } .emotions_item:hover { background-color: var(--weuiDesktop_globalBgColor); } .emotions_item img { cursor: pointer; margin-top: 0px; width: 20px; height: 20px; vertical-align: middle; display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; background-size: 20px; user-select: none; } .related-feed-item-info[data-v-f24d64e0] { --fg-45: rgba(0, 0, 0, .45); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) .related-feed-item-info[data-v-f24d64e0] { --fg-45: !important; } .drawer_main.drawer_show { transform: translate(0px); } .drawer_main .drawer_topbar { height: 40px; position: relative; } .drawer_main .drawer_topbar .drawer_topbar_title { color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 40px; margin-left: 20px; } .drawer_main .drawer_topbar .drawer_topbar_close { position: absolute; right: 8px; top: 8px; display: cid:css-b008bc86-986a-412d-b2ae-f8d7f65862d5@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; .context-menu__list { width: fit-content; box-sizing: border-box; position: fixed; z-index: 10; background: var(--weui-BG-1); border: 1px solid var(--weui-FG-4); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) 0px 0px 10px; list-style: none; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; padding: 4px 0px; min-width: 104px; } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item { position: relative; padding: 0px 12px; line-height: 24px; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--weui-FG-0); cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item:last-child { margin-bottom: 0px; } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item:first-child { margin-top: 0px; } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item:first-child::before { display: none; } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item:hover::after { content: " "; display: block; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: var(--weui-FG-6); pointer-events: none; } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item:active::after, .context-menu__list .context-menu__item.selected::after { content: " "; display: block; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background-color: var(--weui-FG-4); pointer-events: none; } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item:hover::after, .context-menu__list .context-menu__item:active::after, .context-menu__list .context-menu__item.selected::after { left: 6px; right: 6px; border-radius: 2px; z-index: -1; } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item-unified:hover::after { background-color: var(--weui-BRAND-100); } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item-unified:active::after, .context-menu__list .context-menu__item-unified.selected::after { background-color: rgb(6, 174, 86); } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item-unified:hover, .context-menu__list .context-menu__item-unified:active, .context-menu__list .context-menu__item-unified.selected { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item-unified:hover::after, .context-menu__list .context-menu__item-unified:active::after, .context-menu__list .context-menu__item-unified.selected::after { border-radius: 4px; } .context-menu__list .context-menu__item.context-menu__item-warning { color: rgb(250, 81, 81); } ------MultipartBoundary--4JXiuQEjwjl3KFzyIsZwk7GMDwHkwRbfnjtFmAAgWh---- .comment_input_profile .comment_input_profile_avatar { flex-shrink: 0; } .comment_input_profile .comment_input_transfer_btn { --plateBtnHeight: 16; color: var(--weui-BRAND); background: .weui-icon-channels.weui-icon-channels { width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; margin-right: 4px; } .comment_input_profile:active { opacity: 0.5; } .comment_input_profile_avatar { font-size: 26px; border-radius: 100%; width: 1em; height: 1em; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; margin-right: 4px; } .comment_input_profile_avatar.private { border-radius: 2px; transform: scale(calc(0.923077)); } .comment_input_profile_nickname { width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; font-weight: 500; margin-right: 4px; letter-spacing: normal; } :root { --wxBorderAvatarRatio: 3; } .wx_border_avatar { position: relative; display: inline-flex; vertical-align: bottom; } .wx_border_avatar_pic { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; } .wx_border_avatar::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: calc(100% * (1 - var(--wxBorderAvatarRatio))); bottom: calc(100% * (1 - var(--wxBorderAvatarRatio))); transform: scale(calc(1 / var(--wxBorderAvatarRatio))); transform-origin: 0px 0px; border-radius: inherit; } body .weui-btn_reset { font-size: inherit; } body .weui-btn_mini { font-size: 14px; line-height: calc(1.42857); } body .weui-btn_disabled, body .weui-btn[disabled] { color: var(--weui-FG-4); background: var(--weui-BG-1); } body .weui-btn_plate { --plateBtnHeight: 40; --plateBtnPaddingTB: 8; --plateBtnPaddingLR: 12; --plateBtnFontsize: 14; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: calc(1px * var(--plateBtnFontsize)); min-width: calc(1em * var(--plateBtnHeight) / var(--plateBtnFontsize)); min-height: calc(1em * var(--plateBtnHeight) / var(--plateBtnFontsize)); border-radius: calc(1em * var(--plateBtnHeight) / var(--plateBtnFontsize)); padding: calc(1px * var(--plateBtnPaddingTB)) calc(1px * var(--plateBtnPaddingLR)); line-height: calc((var(--plateBtnHeight) - var(--plateBtnPaddingTB) * 2) / var(--plateBtnFontsize)); color: var(--weui-FG-0); background: var(--weui-BG-6); border: 0px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } body .weui-btn_plate:active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; background-color: var(--weui-BTN-ACTIVE-MASK); border-radius: 8px; } body .weui-btn_plate-circle { padding: 0px; } (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --cmtGold-FG: #947849; } } :root { --discussPageGap: 20px; } .use-gold-color { color: var(--cmtGold-FG) !important; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body .stream_comment_dialog { --cmtContent-FG: rgba(255, 255, 255, .8); } } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body.appmsg_cmt_new_ui .appmsg_comment_con { --expandInfo-FG: rgba(255, 255, 255, .3); --cmtContent-FG: rgba(255, 255, 255, .55); } } .outer_dialog .weui-mask, .outer_dialog .weui-mask_transparent { z-index: 5001; } .outer_dialog .weui-dialog { z-index: 5002; } .wx_scroll_tansition { transition: transform 0.3s ease-in-out; } .wx_margin_top_tansition { transition: margin-top 0.3s ease-in-out; } .rich_media_extra_discuss { position: relative; user-select: none; letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 0 env(safe-area-inset-right) var(--appmsgPageBottomGap) env(safe-area-inset-left); margin-top: 8px; } .rich_media_extra_discuss .sns_opr_btn { color: var(--expandInfo-FG); } .rich_media_extra_discuss .praised .praise_num, .rich_media_extra_discuss .praised .sns_opr_btn { color: var(--weui-RED); } .rich_media_extra_discuss .praised .sns_opr_btn { animation: 0.3s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal none running scaleUpDown; transform-origin: center center; } @keyframes scaleUpDown { 0% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.2); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } } .rich_media_extra_discuss .discuss_form_write_mod { background: var(--weui-BG-2); } .rich_media_extra_discuss .searchword-comment-container { padding-bottom: 20px; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .rich_media_extra_discuss .weui-fold-tips { color: var(--weui-FG-1); font-size: 15px; } .rich_media_extra_discuss .weui-loadmore.weui-loadmore_default { margin: 40px 16px 0px; } .comment_primary_area_pc .searchword-comment-container { padding-bottom: 0px; } .rich_media_extra_title_wrp { padding: 0 var(--discussPageGap); line-height: 1.4; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; } .rich_media_extra_title_wrp .tips_global { color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-weight: 400; } .rich_media_extra_title_wrp.weui-flex__item:first-child { margin-right: 20px; } .rich_media_extra_title { font-size: 15px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-weight: 500; } .rich_media_extra_title_empty { font-size: 14px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); margin-top: 120px; } .discuss_mod > .discuss_container { padding-top: 20px; } .discuss_list { font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: -4px; padding: 0 var(--discussPageGap); margin-top: 17px; } .discuss_item { list-style: none; margin-top: 16px; } .discuss_item:first-child { margin-top: 14px; } .discuss_item .comment_primary_input .we-emoji { vertical-align: bottom; margin: 0px 0px 3px; font-size: 18px; } .discuss_media { padding: 6px 8px; margin: 0px -8px; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; } .discuss_media_active { background: var(--weui-FG-5); } .discuss_media_active .wx_folder_btn { background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(225, 225, 225, 0), rgb(225, 225, 225) 50%); } .discuss_bd { flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; } .discuss_user_avatar { width: 32px; height: 32px; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; margin-right: 8px; border-radius: 100%; display: block; margin-top: 0px; } .discuss_user_avatar.private { border-radius: 3px; transform: scale(calc(0.941176)); } .discuss_user_info_wrp { align-items: flex-start; } .discuss_user_info_overflow .discuss_user_info { flex-wrap: wrap; } .discuss_user_info_overflow .discuss_user_info_inner { white-space: normal; } .discuss_user_info_inner { display: flex; align-items: center; white-space: nowrap; } .discuss_user_info_inner.can_warp { flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: 14px; height: 1.5em; line-height: 1.5; overflow: hidden; } .discuss_user_info { display: flex; align-items: center; font-size: 14px; color: var(--expandInfo-FG); } .discuss_user_info .tips_global_primary, .discuss_user_info .icon_appmsg_tag { flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: 6px; text-overflow: unset; } .discuss_user_info .icon_appmsg_tag { position: relative; top: -0.1em; } .discuss_user_info .discuss_user_info_inner .weui-icon-channels, .discuss_user_info .discuss_user_info_inner .weui-icon-mp, .discuss_user_info .discuss_user_info_inner .weui-icon-ph { flex-shrink: 0; width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; margin-left: 2px; } .discuss_user_info .discuss_user_info_inner .weui-icon-mp { margin-top: -0.1em; } .discuss_user_nickname { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--expandInfo-FG); font-weight: 400; width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; min-width: 1.1em; flex-shrink: 0; max-width: 7.1em; word-break: break-all; } .discuss_user_ip { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--expandInfo-FG); margin-left: 6px; } .discuss_relation_tips { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--weui-BRAND-100); flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: 6px; } .discuss_relation_tips.gray { color: var(--expandInfo-FG); } .discuss_relation_tips.red { color: rgb(250, 81, 81); } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { .discuss_relation_tips.red { color: rgb(200, 64, 64); } } .discuss_send_time { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--expandInfo-FG); margin-left: 6px; } .discuss_opr { display: flex; align-items: center; padding-left: 8px; position: relative; line-height: 160%; } .discuss_opr .sns_opr_btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-size: 14px; margin-left: 2px; } .discuss_opr .sns_opr_btn::before { font-size: 18px; margin-top: 0px; } .discuss_opr .praise_num { color: var(--expandInfo-FG); margin-left: 2px; font-size: 14px; margin-right: 0px; } .discuss_opr .praise_num:empty { display: none; } .discuss_opr:not(.discuss_opr_pc) .weui-wa-hotarea-el { transform: translate(calc(-50% + 4px), -50%); } .dislike_pc { opacity: 0; } .discuss_opr_meta { padding: 0px 6px; font-size: 14px; display: inline-block; position: relative; color: var(--expandInfo-FG); white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; } .discuss_opr_meta:last-child { padding-right: 0px; } .discuss_opr_meta:last-child::after { display: none; } .discuss_user_verify_tips { margin: 2px 0px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; display: flex; align-items: center; } .discuss_media .discuss_bd .weui-icon-proof { width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; color: var(--weui-INDIGO); margin: -1px 0px 0px 4px; } .discuss_media .discuss_bd .weui-icon-proof.enterprise { color: var(--weui-YELLOW); } .discuss_message { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--cmtContent-FG); } .discuss_message .wx_folder_btn { font-size: 15px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); bottom: 0px !important; } .discuss_message .wx_folder_btn.wx_folder_btn_en { min-width: 11em; } .protected-image { user-select: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; pointer-events: none; } .discuss_message_content { white-space: pre-wrap; line-height: 1.5; overflow-wrap: break-word; hyphens: auto; } .discuss_message_content .we-emoji { font-size: 18px; user-select: none; -webkit-user-drag: none; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; pointer-events: none; } .discuss_message_content .content_colon { letter-spacing: -6px; } .discuss_message_content_dislike { line-height: 1.5; color: var(--expandInfo-FG); } .img_container { margin-top: 4px; display: cid:css-b45722fc-d948-4a42-8929-3fded080e3cc@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; .cmt-ellipsis-con[data-v-6258d564] { position: relative; } .cmt-ellipsis-con .ellipsis-content[data-v-6258d564] { position: absolute; z-index: -1; width: 100%; visibility: hidden; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: var(--max-line, 3); } .cmt-ellipsis-con .max-height-content[data-v-6258d564] { position: absolute; z-index: -1; width: 100%; visibility: hidden; overflow: hidden; } .cmt-ellipsis-con .actual-content[data-v-6258d564] { position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .cmt-ellipsis-con .actual-content .ellipsis-mask[data-v-6258d564] { position: absolute; height: 100%; width: 100%; z-index: 1; top: 0px; left: 0px; cursor: pointer; } .cmt-ellipsis-con .actual-content.ellipsis[data-v-6258d564] { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: var(--max-line, 3); } .cmt-ellipsis-con .ellipsis-btn[data-v-6258d564] { position: relative; width: fit-content; color: var(--weui-LINK); cursor: pointer; } .cmt-ellipsis-con .ellipsis-btn[data-v-6258d564]::before { position: absolute; content: ""; top: 50%; left: 50%; height: 150%; width: 200%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); } .menu_options_tail[data-v-9a1f3972]::after { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: currentcolor -6.5px 0px 0px 0px; } .menu_options -7px; transform: rotate(14deg); transform-origin: 0px 100%; } .menu_options .menu_options_pic_tail[data-v-9a1f3972] { pointer-events: none; position: absolute; bottom: 0px; left: 50%; width: 14px; height: 5px; mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='14' height='5' viewBox='0 0 14 5' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M0 0L7 7.62939e-06L14 0C11.2663 0 9.13316 5 7 5C4.86683 5 2.73367 0 0 0Z' fill='black'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A"); background: var(--menuBackground); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); } .menu_options.menu_options_pos_bottom[data-v-9a1f3972] { padding: 5px 0px 0px; } .menu_options.menu_options_pos_bottom .menu_options_tail[data-v-9a1f3972] { bottom: auto; top: 1px; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(45deg); } .menu_options.menu_options_pos_bottom .menu_options_tail[data-v-9a1f3972]::before, .menu_options.menu_options_pos_bottom .menu_options_tail[data-v-9a1f3972]::after { box-shadow: currentcolor 6.5px 0px 0px 0px; } .menu_options.menu_options_pos_bottom .menu_options_tail[data-v-9a1f3972]::before { top: 0px; left: -7px; transform: rotate(10deg); } .menu_options.menu_options_pos_bottom .menu_options_tail[data-v-9a1f3972]::after { top: -15px; right: 0px; transform: rotate(80deg); } .menu_options.menu_options_pos_bottom .menu_options_pic_tail[data-v-9a1f3972] { bottom: auto; top: 0px; transform: rotate(180deg); } .menu_options.menu_options_default[data-v-9a1f3972] { color: rgb(76, 76, 76); filter: none; } .menu_options.menu_options_default .menu_options_bar[data-v-9a1f3972] { background: currentcolor; backdrop-filter: none; filter: none; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 4px 30px; } .menu_options.menu_options_default .menu_option_btn_list .sns_opr_btn[data-v-9a1f3972] { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .menu_options.menu_options_default .menu_option_btn_list .sns_opr_btn.loved[data-v-9a1f3972] { color: rgb(250, 81, 81); } .menu_options.menu_options_default .menu_option_btn_list .sns_underline_btn.underlined[data-v-9a1f3972] { color: rgb(7, 193, 96); } .menu_options.menu_options_default .menu_option_btn_list .sns_btn_newline .sns_opr_gap[data-v-9a1f3972]::after, .menu_options.menu_options_default .menu_option_btn_list .sns_split_btn_primary[data-v-9a1f3972]::after, .menu_options.menu_options_default .menu_option_btn_list .sns_split_btn[data-v-9a1f3972]::after { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .menu_options.menu_options_default .wx_underline_praise_wall[data-v-9a1f3972] { min-height: 24px; } .menu_options.menu_options_default .wx_underline_praise_list_horizontal .wx_underline_praise_avatar[data-v-9a1f3972] { width: 24px; height: 24px; margin-right: 4px; border-radius: 2.4px; } .menu_options.menu_options_default .wx_underline_praise_tips[data-v-9a1f3972] { display: flex; align-items: center; margin-left: 4px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; } .menu_options.menu_options_default .wx_underline_praise_tips .wx_underline_praise_love_icon[data-v-9a1f3972] { width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; margin-left: 4px; } .menu_options.menu_options_default .wx_underline_praise_wall_bd.wx_tap_highlight_active .wx_underline_praise_tips[data-v-9a1f3972] { opacity: 0.5; } .menu_options.menu_options_default .wx_underline_praise_wall_ft .sns_opr_btn[data-v-9a1f3972]::before { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .menu_options.menu_options_default .wx_underline_praise_wall_ft .sns_love_btn.loved[data-v-9a1f3972]::before { color: rgb(250, 81, 81); } .menu_options.menu_options_default .wx_underline_praise_wall_ft .sns_opr_gap[data-v-9a1f3972] { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); font-size: 14px; } .context_menu_mask[data-v-9a1f3972] { position: fixed; inset: 0px; } @supports (-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch) { .menu_options[data-v-9a1f3972] { filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 4px 30px); } .menu_options .menu_options_bar[data-v-9a1f3972] { filter: none; } } @supports (-apple-trailing-word:auto) { .menu_options[data-v-9a1f3972] { filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 4px 30px); } .menu_options .menu_options_bar[data-v-9a1f3972] { filter: none; } } ------MultipartBoundary--4JXiuQEjwjl3KFzyIsZwk7GMDwHkwRbfnjtFmAAgWh---- var(--weui-FG-2); } .thanks-btn-wrp .thanks-btn-canvas { position: absolute; font-size: 16px; left: calc(0.5em + 6px); top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none; height: 2.9em !important; width: 2.9em !important; } .thanks-btn-wrp .thanks-btn-canvas.show { visibility: visible; } .thanks-btn-wrp::before { content: ""; display: block; position: absolute; height: calc(100% + 10px); width: calc(100% + 8px); left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); z-index: 2; } ------MultipartBoundary--4JXiuQEjwjl3KFzyIsZwk7GMDwHkwRbfnjtFmAAgWh---- .wx_user_profile_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog { z-index: 5501; } .wx_user_profile_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { padding-bottom: 0px; overflow-x: hidden; } .wx_user_profile_dialog .weui-mask { z-index: 5500; } .wx_user_profile { padding-top: 32px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); line-height: 1.4; overflow: hidden; } .wx_user_profile .weui-icon-colorful-man.weui-icon-colorful-man, .wx_user_profile .weui-icon-colorful-female.weui-icon-colorful-female { display: inline-flex; width: 2em; height: 2em; margin-left: 4px; text-indent: 999em; vertical-align: top; position: relative; top: 0.19em; } .wx_user_profile_avatar { display: block; width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: 56px; margin-right: 20px; border-radius: 8px; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; } .wx_user_profile_nickname_wrp { font-size: 0px; } .wx_user_profile_nickname { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .wx_user_profile_desc { font-size: 14px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); margin-top: 8px; } .wx_user_profile_loading_wrp { position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 56px; text-align: center; } .wx_user_profile_loading_wrp .weui-loading { vertical-align: top; } .weui-pc-popover__area { position: relative; } .weui-pc-popover__wrp { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; user-select: none; } .weui-pc-popover__wrp .weui-mask { display: none; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .weui-pc-popover { --weui-pc-popover-tail-size: 14px; --weui-pc-popover-negative-space: 8px; --weui-pc-popover-offset: 12px; --weui-pc-popover-alignOffset: 24px; --weui-pc-popover-target-rect: 0px; --weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset: calc(var(--weui-pc-popover-alignOffset) + var(--weui-pc-popover-target-rect) / 2 - var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-size) / 2); position: absolute; z-index: 5000; width: 288px; box-sizing: border-box; background-color: var(--weui-BG-5); filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 2px 2px 8px); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--weui-FG-0); line-height: 1.4; border-radius: 8px; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.1); transform: scale(0); } .weui-pc-popover__tail { --weui-radiusTailSize: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-size); --weui-radiusTailColor: var(--weui-BG-5); pointer-events: none; position: absolute; color: var(--weui-BG-5); background: currentcolor; border-radius: 2px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail::after { position: absolute; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: currentcolor -7.5px 0px 0px 0px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::before { bottom: -6.8px; left: 5.5px; transform: rotate(70.5deg); transform-origin: 0px 0px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::after { top: -2.2px; right: -7px; transform: rotate(16deg); transform-origin: 0px 100%; } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right { width: var(--weui-radiusTailSize); height: var(--weui-radiusTailSize); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right::after { content: ""; } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom { bottom: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); left: 50%; margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(45deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top { top: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); left: 50%; margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(225deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left { left: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); top: 50%; margin-top: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(135deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right { right: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); top: 50%; margin-top: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(315deg); } .weui-pc-popover__hd { padding: 24px; } .weui-pc-popover__title { text-align: center; font-size: 14px; } .weui-pc-popover__bd { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .weui-pc-popover_headline .weui-pc-popover__hd { position: relative; } .weui-pc-popover_headline .weui-pc-popover__hd::after { content: ""; display: block; height: 1px; background: var(--weui-FG-3); transform: scaleY(0.5); transform-origin: 0px 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; z-index: 1; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top { bottom: calc(100% + var(--weui-pc-popover-offset)); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-start { transform-origin: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset) 100%; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-center { transform-origin: 0px 100%; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-end { transform-origin: calc(100% - var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset)) 100%; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom { top: calc(100% + var(--weui-pc-popover-offset)); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-start { transform-origin: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset) 0; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-center { transform-origin: 0px 0px; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-end { transform-origin: calc(100% - var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset)) 0; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-left { right: calc(100% + var(--weui-pc-popover-offset)); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-left.weui-pc-popover_align-start { transform-origin: 100% var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-left.weui-pc-popover_align-center { transform-origin: 100% 0px; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-left.weui-pc-popover_align-end { transform-origin: 100% calc(100% - var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset)); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-right { left: calc(100% + var(--weui-pc-popover-offset)); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-right.weui-pc-popover_align-start { transform-origin: 0 var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-right.weui-pc-popover_align-center { transform-origin: 0px 0px; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-right.weui-pc-popover_align-end { transform-origin: 0 calc(100% - var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset)); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-start, .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-start { margin-left: calc(var(--weui-pc-popover-alignOffset) * -1); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-start .weui-pc-popover__tail, .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-start .weui-pc-popover__tail { left: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset); margin-left: auto; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-center, .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-center { left: 50%; transform: scale(0) translate(-50%); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-end, .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-end { right: 0px; margin-right: calc(var(--weui-pc-popover-alignOffset) * -1); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-end .weui-pc-popover__tail, .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-end .weui-pc-popover__tail { left: auto; margin-left: auto; right: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-left.weui-pc-popover_align-start, .weui-pc-popover_pos-right.weui-pc-popover_align-start { margin-top: calc(var(--weui-pc-popover-alignOffset) * -1); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-left.weui-pc-popover_align-start .weui-pc-popover__tail, .weui-pc-popover_pos-right.weui-pc-popover_align-start .weui-pc-popover__tail { margin-top: auto; top: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-left.weui-pc-popover_align-center, .weui-pc-popover_pos-right.weui-pc-popover_align-center { top: 50%; transform: scale(0) translateY(-50%); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-left.weui-pc-popover_align-end, .weui-pc-popover_pos-right.weui-pc-popover_align-end { bottom: 0px; margin-bottom: calc(var(--weui-pc-popover-alignOffset) * -1); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-left.weui-pc-popover_align-end .weui-pc-popover__tail, .weui-pc-popover_pos-right.weui-pc-popover_align-end .weui-pc-popover__tail { margin-top: auto; top: auto; bottom: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset); } .weui-pc-popover_show { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; } .weui-pc-popover_show .weui-mask { display: block; } .weui-pc-popover_show .weui-pc-popover { transform: scale(1); } .weui-pc-popover_show .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-center, .weui-pc-popover_show .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-center { transform: scale(1) translate(-50%); } .weui-pc-popover_show .weui-pc-popover_pos-left.weui-pc-popover_align-center, .weui-pc-popover_show .weui-pc-popover_pos-right.weui-pc-popover_align-center { transform: scale(1) translateY(-50%); } .wx_user_profile_dialog_pc { z-index: 5500; } .wx_user_profile_dialog_pc .weui-pc-popover { z-index: 5501; } .wx_user_profile_dialog_pc .weui-mask_transparent { z-index: 5500; } .wx_user_profile_dialog_pc .wx_user_profile { padding: 24px; } .wx_user_profile_dialog_pc .wx_user_profile_loading_wrp { bottom: auto; text-align: left; top: 58px; font-size: 56px; left: calc(1em + 44px); } .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog.wx_bottom_modal { min-height: 304px; padding: 0px; } .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__wrp { padding: 0px 24px; } .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__wrp .weui-btn_icon i { width: 24px; height: 24px; } .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .wx_user_profile { padding: 8px 24px; } .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .wx_user_profile_avatar { border-radius: 4px; width: 64px; height: 64px; margin-right: 12px; } .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .wx_user_profile_desc { margin-top: 2px; } .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .top-right-opr { font-size: 15px; } .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .wx_user_profile_right_btn { margin-left: auto; } .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .wx_user_profile_right_btn .weui-icon-arrow { width: 1em; height: 2em; } .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .weui-icon-colorful-man, .wx_user_friend_profile_dialog .weui-icon-colorful-female { background-color: transparent !important; } ------MultipartBoundary--4JXiuQEjwjl3KFzyIsZwk7GMDwHkwRbfnjtFmAAgWh---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: { z-index: 5500; } .wx_user_profile { padding-top: 32px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); line-height: 1.4; overflow: hidden; } .wx_user_profile .weui-icon-colorful-man.weui-icon-colorful-man, .wx_user_profile .weui-icon-colorful-female.weui-icon-colorful-female { display: inline-flex; width: 2em; height: 2em; margin-left: 4px; text-indent: 999em; vertical-align: top; position: relative; top: 0.19em; } .wx_user_profile_avatar { display: block; width: 1em; height: 1em; font-size: 56px; margin-right: 20px; border-radius: 8px; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; } .wx_user_profile_nickname_wrp { font-size: 0px; } .wx_user_profile_nickname { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 500; } .wx_user_profile_desc { font-size: 14px; color: var(--weui-FG-1); margin-top: 8px; } .wx_user_profile_loading_wrp { position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 56px; text-align: center; } .wx_user_profile_loading_wrp .weui-loading { vertical-align: top; } .weui-pc-popover__area { position: relative; } .weui-pc-popover__wrp { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; user-select: none; } .weui-pc-popover__wrp .weui-mask { display: none; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .weui-pc-popover { --weui-pc-popover-tail-size: 14px; --weui-pc-popover-negative-space: 8px; --weui-pc-popover-offset: 12px; --weui-pc-popover-alignOffset: 24px; --weui-pc-popover-target-rect: 0px; --weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset: calc(var(--weui-pc-popover-alignOffset) + var(--weui-pc-popover-target-rect) / 2 - var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-size) / 2); position: absolute; z-index: 5000; width: 288px; box-sizing: border-box; background-color: var(--weui-BG-5); filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 2px 2px 8px); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--weui-FG-0); line-height: 1.4; border-radius: 8px; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.1); transform: scale(0); } .weui-pc-popover__tail { --weui-radiusTailSize: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-size); --weui-radiusTailColor: var(--weui-BG-5); pointer-events: none; position: absolute; color: var(--weui-BG-5); background: currentcolor; border-radius: 2px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail::after { position: absolute; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: currentcolor -7.5px 0px 0px 0px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::before { bottom: -6.8px; left: 5.5px; transform: rotate(70.5deg); transform-origin: 0px 0px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::after { top: -2.2px; right: -7px; transform: rotate(16deg); transform-origin: 0px 100%; } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right { width: var(--weui-radiusTailSize); height: var(--weui-radiusTailSize); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right::after { content: ""; } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom { bottom: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); left: 50%; margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(45deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top { top: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); left: 50%; margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(225deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left { left: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); top: 50%; margin-top: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(135deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right { right: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); top: 50%; margin-top: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(315deg); } .weui-pc-popover__hd { padding: 24px; } .weui-pc-popover__title { text-align: center; font-size: 14px; } .weui-pc-popover__bd { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .weui-pc-popover_headline .weui-pc-popover__hd { position: relative; } .weui-pc-popover_headline .weui-pc-popover__hd::after { content: ""; display: block; height: 1px; background: var(--weui-FG-3); transform: scaleY(0.5); transform-origin: 0px 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; z-index: 1; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top { bottom: calc(100% + var(--weui-pc-popover-offset)); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-start { transform-origin: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset) 100%; } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-center { transform-origin: 0px .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-center, .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-center { left: 50%; transform: scale(0) translate(-50%); } .weui-pc-popover_pos-top.weui-pc-popover_align-end, .weui-pc-popover_pos-bottom.weui-pc-popover_align-end { right: 0px; margin-right: calc(var(--weui-pc-popover-alignOffset) * -1); } .wx_identity_group .weui-cells.weui-cells { margin: 0px; } .wx_identity_group .weui-cells.weui-cells::before { display: none; } .wx_identity_group .weui-cells::after { display: none; } .wx_identity_group .weui-cell.weui-cell { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; padding-left: var(--weui-cellPaddingLR); padding-right: var(--weui-cellPaddingLR); } .wx_identity_group .weui-cell.weui-cell .weui-cell__hd.weui-cell__hd { padding-right: 10px; } .wx_identity_group .wx_identity_cell::before, .wx_identity_group .weui-cell_add::before, .wx_identity_group calc(2.55294em + 2px); display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; } .wx_identity_group .weui-cell__desc { padding-top: 2px; font-size: 14px; } .wx_identity_group .weui-btn_plate-circle { border-radius: 4px; } .wx_identity_group .weui-btn_plate-circle .weui-icon-outlined-add { width: 2em; height: 2em; } .wx_identity_group .weui-cells__tips.weui-cells__tips { margin-top: 12px; padding: 0 var(--weui-cellPaddingLR); } .sync_interactive_identity { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; color: var(--weui-FG-2); font-size: 14px; padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; padding-left: var(--weui-cellPaddingLR); padding-right: var(--weui-cellPaddingLR); } .sync_interactive_identity .sync_interactive_identity_checkbox { display: flex; margin-right: 4px; } .sync_interactive_identity .sync_interactive_identity_checkbox .weui-icon-checked { width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='25' height='24' style='stroke:black;stroke-opacity:0.3;' stroke-width='1.2'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A"); mask-repeat: no-repeat; mask-size: 100% 1.6em; background: var(--weui-FG-2); } .sync_interactive_identity fill='white' style='fill:white;fill-opacity:1;'/%3E%3C/svg%3E%0A") 50% 50% / 100% 1.6em no-repeat transparent; } .wx_identity_avatar { display: block; font-size: 40px; width: 1em; height: 1em; border-radius: 100%; vertical-align: top; background-size: cover; background-position: 50% 50%; } .wx_identity_avatar.private { border-radius: 4px; transform: scale(calc(0.95)); } .wx_identity_nickname { width: auto; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; overflow-wrap: normal; font-weight: 400; } .wx_identity_nickname + .weui-icon-mp, .wx_identity_nickname + .weui-icon-ph { flex-shrink: 0; width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; margin-left: 4px; } .wx_identity_nickname + .weui-icon-channels.weui-icon-channels { flex-shrink: 0; width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; margin-left: 4px; } .weui-pc-popover__area { position: relative; } .weui-pc-popover__wrp { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; user-select: none; } .weui-pc-popover__wrp .weui-mask { display: none; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); } .weui-pc-popover { --weui-pc-popover-tail-size: 14px; --weui-pc-popover-negative-space: 8px; --weui-pc-popover-offset: 12px; --weui-pc-popover-alignOffset: 24px; --weui-pc-popover-target-rect: 0px; --weui-pc-popover-tail-alignOffset: calc(var(--weui-pc-popover-alignOffset) + var(--weui-pc-popover-target-rect) / 2 - var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-size) / 2); position: absolute; z-index: 5000; width: 288px; box-sizing: border-box; background-color: var(--weui-BG-5); filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 2px 2px 8px); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--weui-FG-0); line-height: 1.4; border-radius: 8px; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.1); transform: scale(0); } .weui-pc-popover__tail { --weui-radiusTailSize: var(--weui-pc-popover-tail-size); --weui-radiusTailColor: var(--weui-BG-5); pointer-events: none; position: absolute; color: var(--weui-BG-5); background: currentcolor; border-radius: 2px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail::after { position: absolute; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: currentcolor -7.5px 0px 0px 0px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::before { bottom: -6.8px; left: 5.5px; transform: rotate(70.5deg); transform-origin: 0px 0px; } .weui-pc-popover__tail::after { top: -2.2px; right: -7px; transform: rotate(16deg); transform-origin: 0px 100%; } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right { width: var(--weui-radiusTailSize); height: var(--weui-radiusTailSize); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right::before, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left::after, .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right::after { content: ""; } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-bottom { bottom: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); left: 50%; margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(45deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-top { top: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); left: 50%; margin-left: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(225deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-left { left: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); top: 50%; margin-top: calc(-1 * var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); transform: rotate(135deg); } .weui-pc-popover__tail_pos-right { right: calc(1px - var(--weui-radiusTailSize) / 2); top: 50%; margin-top: calc(-1 * relative; z-index: 1; } .weui-pc-popover_headline .weui-pc-popover__hd { position: relative; } .weui-pc-popover_headline .weui-pc-popover__hd::after { content: ""; display: block; height: 1px; .weui-cell__ft.weui-cell__ft { padding: 0px; } body .weui-cell_swiped > .weui-cell__bd { background: transparent; } body .weui-cell_swiped > .weui-cell__ft { left: 100%; right: auto; z-index: 5; } body .weui-cell_swiped .weui-swiped-btn { font-size: 17px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); white-space: nowrap; border: 0px; outline: 0px; } body .weui-cell_swiped-bounce > .weui-cell__bd { transition: transform 0.16s ease-in-out; } body .weui-cell_swiped-bounce .weui-swiped-btn { transition: transform 0.16s ease-in-out; } body .weui-cell_swiped-overflow > .weui-cell__bd { transition: transform 0.2s linear; } body .weui-cell_swiped-overflow .weui-swiped-btn { transition: transform 0.2s linear; } body .weui-cell_custom-active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: var(--weui-FG-3); pointer-events: none; } ------MultipartBoundary--4JXiuQEjwjl3KFzyIsZwk7GMDwHkwRbfnjtFmAAgWh---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: 0px; z-index: 5051; } .wx_at_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { padding-bottom: calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); } .wx_at_dialog .weui-mask { z-index: 5050; } .wx_at_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd, .wx_at_dialog .weui-half-screen-dialog__ft { padding: 0 calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-right)) 0 calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search { background-color: var(--weui-BG-1); border-radius: 4px; height: 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0px 16px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search .weui-icon-search { color: var(--weui-FG-2); } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search .clear { display: none; margin-right: 8px; transition: 0.3s ease-in-out; transform: scale(0); opacity: 0; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search .clear .weui-icon-clear { color: var(--weui-FG-2); width: 1.6em; height: 1.6em; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search .clear.show { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search .clear.weui-wa-hotarea::after { min-width: 36px; min-height: 36px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search input { width: 2em; border: 0px; background-color: transparent; font-size: 17px; padding: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 4px; color: var(--weui-FG-0); outline: 0px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search.at-dialog_search-focused .weui-icon-search { margin-left: 8px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search.at-dialog_search-focused .clear { display: inline; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_search.at-dialog_search-focused input { flex: 1 1 0%; padding-right: 10px; margin: 0px 4px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_loading { margin-top: 160px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_loading .weui-loading { margin: 0px; } .wx_at_dialog .at-dialog_tips { margin-top: 160px; color: var(--weui-FG-2); text-align: center; } ------MultipartBoundary--4JXiuQEjwjl3KFzyIsZwk7GMDwHkwRbfnjtFmAAgWh---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: .wx-root:not([data-weui-theme="light"]), body:not([data-weui-theme="light"]) { --weui-DIALOG-LINE-COLOR: rgba(255, 255, 255, .1); } } .weui-mask { position: fixed; z-index: 1000; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); } .weui-mask_transparent { position: fixed; z-index: 1000; inset: 0px; } .weui-half-screen-dialog { position: fixed; left: 0px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; min-height: 255px; max-height: 75%; z-index: 5000; line-height: 1.4; background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); color: var(--weui-FG-0); border-top-left-radius: 12px; border-top-right-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0 calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-right)) env(safe-area-inset-bottom) calc(24px + env(safe-area-inset-left)); box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; flex-direction: column; outline: 0px; } @media only screen and (max-device-height: 558px) { .weui-half-screen-dialog { max-height: calc(100% - 16px); } } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd { min-height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-btn_icon { position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: inherit; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-btn_icon:active { opacity: 0.5; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__action-group { position: absolute; top: 50%; white-space: nowrap; transform: translateY(-50%); display: flex; align-items: center; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__action { margin-right: 16px; position: static; transform: none; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__action.weui-wa-hotarea { position: relative; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__action.weui-link { font-size: 15px; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side { position: relative; left: -8px; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main { flex: 1 1 0%; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main { text-align: center; padding: 0px 40px; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side { right: -8px; left: auto; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__action-group { right: 0px; } .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main { padding: 0px; } .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main { background-color: var(--weui-BG-2); } .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__main + .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd__side { text-align: right; } .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__bd { flex: 1 1 0%; overflow-y: auto; .wx_bottom_modal .channel_title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; padding: 40px 20px 11.5px; } .wx_bottom_modal .weui-half-screen-dialog__hd_channel { padding: 0px !important; } .weui-mask { visibility: visible; } .wx_bottom_modal_show > .weui-half-screen-dialog { transform: translateZ(0px); } .wx_bottom_modal_show.wx_bottom_modal_right > .weui-half-screen-dialog { transform: .weui-mask.wx_bottom_modal_mask, .wx_bottom_modal_mask_fixed { top: -120px; } .fullscreen-padding .weui-mask.wx_bottom_modal_mask { transition: opacity 0.3s; } .wx_bottom_modal_mask_fixed { position:
